commit_scope: Lift the minimal bootstrap host from a Windows-only C loader to a cross-platform host source with Windows LoadLibrary/GetProcAddress, POSIX dlopen/dlsym, boundary timing output, a third Form-native recipe DLL proof, and Windows LLVM/clang support for building the emitted fkwu fourth kernel.
evidence_refs: form/native/bootstrap/form_bootstrap_host.c -> cross-platform C host source: Windows LoadLibraryA/GetProcAddress branch plus macOS/Linux/Android dlopen/dlsym branch
FORM_BOOTSTRAP_MEASURE=1 -> emits boundary=form-native-to-host-os-loader, primitive=dynamic-library-call, loader, load_ns, resolve_ns, call_ns, total_ns

form/scripts/fourth-arm.sh -> Windows fkwu build path now patches the emitted C carrier for arc4random, gettimeofday, sprintf, mkdir arity, dlopen/dlsym stubs, and links LLVM/clang with ws2_32 plus legacy_stdio_definitions before any GCC fallback
form/validate.sh and form/scripts/fourth-arm.sh -> cache-key hashing now probes shasum and falls back to sha1sum, so Git Bash does not require /usr/bin/core_perl on PATH

Git Bash with fake gcc fallback disabled and fake shasum first in PATH: rm -f form-stdlib/.cache/fourth/fkwu-*; PATH=.cache/fake-bin:$PATH ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/bootstrap-host.fk form-stdlib/tests/bootstrap-host-band.fk -> 4095; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent; proves local LLVM/clang builds fkwu on Windows and sha1sum carries cache keys when shasum is unavailable

Git Bash with Windows toolchain PATH: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/bootstrap-host.fk form-stdlib/tests/bootstrap-host-band.fk -> core.fk+bootstrap-host.fk+bootstrap-host-band.fk -> 4095; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent

Git Bash with Windows toolchain PATH: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-pe-coff.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-pe-coff-band.fk -> core.fk+form-pe-coff.fk+form-pe-coff-band.fk -> 511; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent

Git Bash with Windows toolchain PATH: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-targets.fk form-stdlib/tests/hati-os-targets-band.fk -> core.fk+hati-os-targets.fk+hati-os-targets-band.fk -> 8388607; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent

Git Bash with Windows toolchain PATH: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh bootstrap-host form-pe-coff hati-os-targets -> PASS-4WAY bootstrap-host, PASS-4WAY form-pe-coff, PASS-4WAY hati-os-targets

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\verify_cross_platform_bootstrap_host_no_go.ps1 -> PASS; no Go command is used; compiler=C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\gcc.exe; linker=C:\Program Files\LLVM\bin\lld-link.exe; recipe results 22, 26, 51; loader=LoadLibraryA/GetProcAddress load_ns=674200 resolve_ns=5900 call_ns=1800 total_ns=681900

Subagent Hubble corrected read-only verification -> PASS with no go test: bootstrap-host 4095, form-pe-coff 511, hati-os-targets 8388607, PASS-4WAY for all three, no-Go C proof status=pass with recipes 22/26/51 and measurement load_ns=126200 resolve_ns=2600 call_ns=1000 total_ns=129800

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: This change adds a local cross-platform bootstrap source and Windows host proof. Public deployment validation remains pending until PR checks and post-merge deploy flow.

phase_gate.reason: Local and sub-agent validation passed; CI and deploy validation remain pending until commit, push, PR checks, and merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The bootstrap host is now a cross-platform dynamic-library loader contract, the Windows proof extends the native DLL shape from two to three Form-emitted recipes with boundary timing measurements, and Windows can build the emitted fkwu fourth kernel through local LLVM/clang instead of skipping that leg.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form stdlib, cross-platform bootstrap C source, and Go native loader tests; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Form four-way proof: bootstrap-host band validates to 4095 on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu with 0 divergent.

Windows fkwu build proof: with fake gcc and fake shasum earlier in PATH and the fkwu cache cleared, validate.sh rebuilds fkwu through local LLVM/clang, uses sha1sum for cache keys, and still attaches the fourth arm.
Form native recipe expansion proof: form-pe-coff band validates to 511, adding pe-x64-recipe-add42-code as a third emitted native recipe body.
Target catalog proof: hati-os-targets remains 8388607 after the bootstrap source moves to form/native/bootstrap/form_bootstrap_host.c.

Runtime proof: no-Go PowerShell verifier compiles the cross-platform C source on Windows, writes three PE/COFF objects matching the Form-proven object shape, links three DLLs with lld-link /dll /noentry /machine:x64 /export:recipe, confirms the exe swaps all three behind recipe, and verifies load/resolve/call/total timing fields.
